name: button-group-popover
visual_summary: A button group with a popover containing an action button, used for displaying a dropdown action in a navigation bar or sidebar. It provides quick access to an action and takes up less visual space than a full-screen modal. Typically used when the user needs to initiate a specific action.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: button-group-popover
Description: A button group with a popover containing an action button, used for displaying a dropdown action in a navigation bar or sidebar. It provides quick access to an action and takes up less visual space than a full-screen modal. Typically used when the user needs to initiate a specific action.
Style: flat, rounded, minimal
Interactions: hover, clickable, dismissable
Tags: navigation, dropdown, actionable

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
